emitOutputs.ts: issue body + README patch. POST GitHub issues when token set.

## Acceptance criteria

- [x] `emitOutputs.ts` posts GitHub issue when GITHUB_TOKEN set
- [x] issueBody + readmePatch stored in githubOutputs
- [x] No direct file commits to target repo
- [x] Zero emojis in generated text (prompt constraint)

## Labels

`buildathon`, `layer-ship`
